summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Orders module with 11 new features. All features verified working correctly. Fixed one bug: Cancel Order modal radio buttons were not clickable due to missing onClick handler.
passed_tests: 1. PENDING TAB: Footer shows Export, Cancel order (red), Schedule pickup (primary), Assign courier (primary). NO Import button ✅
2. ACCEPTED TAB: Footer shows Export, Cancel order, Schedule pickup, Assign courier. NO Import button ✅
3. PACKED TAB: Footer shows Print labels (primary), Create manifest (primary). NO other buttons ✅

4. READY TO SHIP TAB: Shows card view with View packages button. Sub-view has Back button, summary card (Channel, Fulfillment, Packages, Courier), packages table with all required columns, Re-print labels footer button ✅
5. IN-TRANSIT TAB: Columns (Order details, Product details, Shipping method, Shipped on, Payment, AWB no., Status 'In-transit' badge). Footer: Export, Print invoice, Mark as delivered ✅
6. COMPLETED TAB: Same as in-transit but 'Delivered on' column and 'Delivered' status badge. Footer: Export, Print invoice ✅
7. CANCELLED TAB: Has 'Cancelled on' and 'Reason' columns. Status shows 'Cancelled' badge. Footer: Export, Print credit note ✅

8. CANCEL ORDER MODAL: Shows product info, 5 radio buttons (Product not available, Product damaged, Customer requested cancellation, Product missing, Other), textarea when Other selected, Cancel order CTA ✅
9. ASSIGN COURIER DATE PICKER: Modal shows date input (type=date), courier dropdown, courier service dropdown ✅
10. COUNTS SYNCED: All channels shows 84 total, each status tab shows 12, each marketplace shows 14 ✅
11. STATUS COLUMN: Pending tab shows 'Pending' badge (not Paid/COD). Only one Status column ✅

bugs_fixed.issue: Cancel Order modal radio buttons (5 reasons) were not clickable - missing onClick handler on label elements
bugs_fixed.fix: Added onClick={() => setSelectedReason(reason)} to each label element

critical_code_review_comments: OrdersPage.tsx is well-structured with separate components for each view/table type
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Status-specific footers implemented correctly via ActionBar component
Ready to Ship card view and packages sub-view working correctly
Counts are dynamically computed from mock data and properly synced
seed_data_creation: All data MOCKED using generateMockOrders() function - generates 84 orders across 6 marketplaces with 14 orders each
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orders module fully tested. Key features verified: status-specific footers (Pending/Accepted: Export+Cancel+Schedule pickup+Assign courier; Packed: Print labels+Create manifest; In-Transit: Export+Print invoice+Mark delivered; Completed: Export+Print invoice; Cancelled: Export+Print credit note), Ready to Ship card view with packages sub-view, Cancel Order modal with 5 radio reasons and textarea for Other, Assign Courier modal with date picker (type=date). All counts synced (84 total, 12 per status, 14 per marketplace). Status column shows actual status badges not Payment info.

mocked_api_info.details: Entire app is UI-only. All order data generated by generateMockOrders() in OrdersPage.tsx. No backend APIs.
